metal_acid.pattern: active metal + dilute acid → salt + H₂
metal_acid.conditions: Metal must be above hydrogen in activity series; acid must be dilute (not HNO₃)

metal_displacement.pattern: more active metal + salt solution → new salt + displaced metal
metal_displacement.conditions: More active metal (not alkali/alkaline earth) + solution of less active metal salt

basic_oxide_water.pattern: basic oxide of alkali/alkaline earth metal + water → alkali
basic_oxide_water.conditions: Oxide must be soluble (Na₂O, K₂O, CaO, BaO)

acidic_oxide_water.conditions: Oxide must not be SiO₂ (does not react with water)

salt_precipitate_exchange.conditions: Both starting materials must be soluble; one product must be an insoluble precipitate

insoluble_base_decomposition.pattern: insoluble base → metal oxide + water (upon heating)
